text:
Once upon a time in a small village nestled between rolling hills and a whispering forest, there lived a young girl named Elara. Elara was known for her kind heart and her curious mind. She spent her days exploring the woods and learning from the wise old owl who perched atop the tallest tree.

One sunny morning, as Elara was collecting wildflowers, she heard a soft cry coming from deep within the forest. Following the sound, she found a little bird with a broken wing, its tiny body trembling. Elara gently scooped the bird into her hands and carried it back to her cottage.

Over the next few days, Elara tended to the bird, feeding it and keeping it warm. The bird grew stronger each day under her care. One evening, as the sun set behind the hills, the bird spread its wings and took flight, soaring high above the trees before circling back to perch on Elara’s shoulder.

From that day forward, the bird would visit El
